message: Welcome to the TM2500 XPRESS Automatic Fire and Gas Functional Test.
The Fire and Gas Protection System is operating normally.
Initiating Automatic Functional Test.
Testing Manual Aerosol Suppression Release Stations HS-3092 and HS-3093.
Activating HS-3092.
Horn Acknowledge Switch HS-3040 is activated.
Aerosol release command generated.
Resetting the system.
Activating HS-3093.
Resetting the system after HS-3093 test.
Testing Heat Detectors TS-3003 and TS-3014.
Activating TS-3003.
Resetting the system after TS-3003 test.
Activating TS-3014.
Resetting the system after TS-3014 test.
Testing gas detection alarm and shutdown logic.
Gas detector AE-3004A low gas alarm test.
Gas detector AE-3004A high gas shutdown test. Gas does not release Stat-X.
Resetting gas alarm test.
LOTO / suppression inhibit test active. Release outputs are blocked.
Automatic functional test complete.
